title: Vehicle Fire/Explosion on I-75 North at Mile 14
detail: Fire and police responding to a vehicle fire with fireworks explosions on Interstate 75 Northbound near mile marker 14.

title: Multi-Vehicle Crash I-75 NB near Mile 175
detail: Collision involving semi, box truck, and pickup on I-75 NB at mile marker 175; injuries reported, scene cleared by 14:30.

title: EMS response to chest pain at 1140 James Blvd
detail: 75-year-old female experiencing chest pain, weakness, and dizziness at 1140 James Boulevar.
